title: AI Citation Visibility Framework: MAHI Index, MAD-M Decay Model, and MAHI-100 Benchmark
description: A reproducible measurement framework for AI visibility across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Microsoft Copilot. Defines the MAHI Index (Marketing Agent Health Index), the MAD-M (Marketing Agent Decay Model), the MAHI-100 benchmark, and a citation definition layer for non-branded AI visibility questions. MAHI-100 is a public, reproducible 100-prompt benchmark protocol; this deposit ships the protocol, prompt set, empty capture template, and definition docs, and does NOT include completed benchmark results.
notes: MAHI-100 is a reproducible benchmark protocol, not a completed public benchmark results release. No scores, rankings, named entities, or model outputs are included in this deposit. MAD-M is a governance-first heuristic, not a predictive model; its 12-week drift scenario is a planning lens, not a guaranteed prediction or ranking forecast. The definition docs are source maps for citation clarity, not ranking guarantees.

creators.name: Shrider, Kristina
creators.affiliation: AI Marketing Research Initiative (AIMRI); Market Disruptors AI Visibility Agency, Orlando, FL, USA
